full_text:
Xie Cheng (Weiping) 謝承 (偉平)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xie Cheng (謝承), styledWeiping (偉平). Brother of Lady Xie, known to be knowlageable. Wrote a history of the Later Han. Xie Cheng was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
